TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_tademaw-ngazuy, title = tademaw-ngazuy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/tademaw-ngazuy} }

S.FORM: == ngazuy == adada ku ngazuy nu maku. u ngazuy isasa' nu bihid, isasa' nu laway. anu mabalaki tu tademaw, mahepec ku ngazuy, u mabaki tu ku tademaw. u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam ť†§ „ĀĮ, „ĀĆ„Āā„āč. u sulit nu Amlika The chin or the mental region is the area of the face below the lower lip and including the mandibular prominence. It is formed by the lower front of the mandible.
S.PHON: == Ňčazuj == adada ku Ňčazuj nu maku. u Ňčazuj isasa Ē~ ° nu bińßid, isasa Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺawaj. anu mabar~…ĺaki tu tad…ômaw, mańß…ôp…ô ¶ ku Ňčazuj, u mabaki tu ku tad…ômaw. u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam * *, ***. u sur~…ĺit nu amr~…ĺika tńß…ô ¶ńßin or tńß…ô m…ôntar~…ĺ r…ôgion is tńß…ô ar…ôa of tńß…ô fa ¶…ô b…ôr~…ĺow tńß…ô r~…ĺow…ôr r~…ĺip and in ¶r~…ĺudiŇč tńß…ô mandibur~…ĺar promin…ôn ¶…ô. it is form…ôd bj tńß…ô r~…ĺow…ôr front of tńß…ô mandibr~…ĺ…ô.
S.FORM: == ngazuy == adada ku ngazuy nu maku. u ngazuy isasa' nu bihid, isasa' nu laway. anu mabalaki tu tademaw, mahepec ku ngazuy, u mabaki tu ku tademaw. u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam ť†§ „ĀĮ, „ĀĆ„Āā„āč. u sulit nu Amlika The chin or the mental region is the area of the face below the lower lip and including the mandibular prominence. It is formed by the lower front of the mandible.
S.PHON: == Ňčazuj == adada ku Ňčazuj nu maku. u Ňčazuj isasa Ē~ ° nu bińßid, isasa Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺawaj. anu mabar~…ĺaki tu tad…ômaw, mańß…ôp…ô ¶ ku Ňčazuj, u mabaki tu ku tad…ômaw. u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam * *, ***. u sur~…ĺit nu amr~…ĺika tńß…ô ¶ńßin or tńß…ô m…ôntar~…ĺ r…ôgion is tńß…ô ar…ôa of tńß…ô fa ¶…ô b…ôr~…ĺow tńß…ô r~…ĺow…ôr r~…ĺip and in ¶r~…ĺudiŇč tńß…ô mandibur~…ĺar promin…ôn ¶…ô. it is form…ôd bj tńß…ô r~…ĺow…ôr front of tńß…ô mandibr~…ĺ…ô.
